'''kagojo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:arabinase|arabinase]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-g-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:arabinase|arabinase]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| kagojo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || kægejeth || kægejej || kægejesh || kægeje
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || kagogojoth || kagogojoj || kagogojosh || kagogojo
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || kagojoth || kagojoj || kagojosh || kagojo
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || kagofjofth || kagofjofj || kagofjofsh || kagofjof
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || kagojotho || kagojojo || kagojosho || kagojoko
|-
| [[Patient]] || kagojoth || kagojoj || kagojosh || kagojo
|-
| [[Possessive]] || kagojothol || kagojojol || kagojoshol || kagojokol
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || kagojoothotho || kagojoojojo || kagojooshosho || kagojooko
|-
| [[Dative]] || kagojothon || kagojojon || kagojoshon || kagojokon
|-
| [[Speaker]] || kagojothooro || kagojojooro || kagojoshooro || kagojokooro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words 5bad82d]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|5a3fb4a}}
